data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the service menu displayed on Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the service menu being displayed on Google, but the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. While there are multiple passed steps indicating various functionalities, none directly address the display of the service menu on Google, which is a critical component of the requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the service menu is displayed on Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for service menu display
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the service menu is displayed on Google.
